extensionName.description: ⚠️ MACHINE-TRANSLATED — needs native-speaker review. 'GeoSpoof' is a brand name; do not translate.

extensionDescription.message: ブラウザの位置情報とタイムゾーンを偽装し、VPN に自動同期し、WebRTC による IP 漏洩をブロックします。
extensionDescription.description: Extension description shown in the browser and store listing.

onboarding_step1_strong.description: Bolded lead-in for the first onboarding step.

onboarding_step1_text.message: タブから都市を検索するか、座標を手動で入力してください
onboarding_step1_text.description: Body text of the first onboarding step.

onboarding_step2_strong.message: 位置情報保護を有効にすると
onboarding_step2_strong.description: Bolded lead-in for the second onboarding step.

onboarding_step2_text.description: Body text of the second onboarding step.

onboarding_step3_strong.description: Bolded lead-in for the third onboarding step.

onboarding_step3_text.message: プライバシーを強化するには WebRTC 保護を有効にしてください
onboarding_step3_text.description: Body text of the third onboarding step.

onboarding_button.description: Button that closes the onboarding overlay.

status_disabled.description: Status pill shown when location protection is off.

status_enabled.description: Status pill shown when location protection is on.

tab_main.description: Tab label for the main popup view.

tab_details.description: Tab label for the protection details view.

tab_filters.description: Tab label for the site-scoping filters view.

filters_heading.description: Heading for the site-scoping filters panel.

filters_modeGroupAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the scope-mode selector group.

filters_modeAll.description: Scope mode option: spoof on every site.

filters_modeAllowlist.description: Scope mode option: spoof only on listed sites.

filters_modeDenylist.description: Scope mode option: spoof on every site except listed ones.

filters_modeAllDesc.message: 偽装はすべてのサイトに適用されます。
filters_modeAllDesc.description: Description shown under the selector when 'All' mode is active.

filters_modeAllowlistDesc.message: 偽装はリストに登録されたサイトのみに適用されます。
filters_modeAllowlistDesc.description: Description shown under the selector when 'Allowlist' mode is active.

filters_modeDenylistDesc.message: 偽装はリストに登録されたサイトを除くすべてのサイトに適用されます。
filters_modeDenylistDesc.description: Description shown under the selector when 'Denylist' mode is active.

filters_addPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text in the add-site input.

filters_addButton.description: Button that adds the typed domain to the active list.

filters_invalidDomain.message: 有効なドメインではありません
filters_invalidDomain.description: Inline message shown when the typed domain is invalid.

filters_emptyList.message: サイトはまだ追加されていません
filters_emptyList.description: Indicator shown when the active site list is empty.

filters_notSaved.message: ⚠️ 変更は保存されませんでした
filters_notSaved.description: Inline message shown when a scope change could not be saved.

filters_loadError.message: ⚠️ 設定を読み込めませんでした
filters_loadError.description: Inline message shown when the popup cannot load settings.

filters_removeAriaLabel.description: Accessible label prefix on a site's remove button.

filters_addCurrentButton.description: Button that adds the active tab's site to the active list.

filters_currentPageRestricted.message: このページは追加できません
filters_currentPageRestricted.description: Inline message shown when the current page is a restricted URL that cannot be added.

filters_currentPageInvalid.message: このサイトは追加できません
filters_currentPageInvalid.description: Inline message shown when the current tab's hostname cannot be added to a list.

filters_allowedSites.description: Header above the list of allowlisted sites.

filters_blockedSites.description: Header above the list of denylisted sites.

toggle_locationProtection.description: Label for the toggle that enables location spoofing.

toggle_webrtcProtection.description: Label for the toggle that enables WebRTC IP leak protection.

heading_location.description: Section heading above the spoofed location display.

heading_protection.description: Section heading above the protection toggles in the Main tab.

heading_mode.description: Section heading above the scope-mode selector in the Filters tab.

location_none.message: 位置が設定されていません
location_none.description: Shown when no spoofed location has been configured.

location_custom.description: Shown above a manually entered (non-search) location.

location_clearTitle.description: Tooltip title on the clear-location button.

location_clearAriaLabel.description: Accessible label on the clear-location button.

toggle_syncWithVpn.description: Label for the toggle that syncs location to the user's public IP.

vpnSync_infoAriaLabel.description: Accessible label on the VPN sync info icon.

vpnSync_tooltip.message: 現在のパブリック IP の位置にスプーフィングした位置を同期します。VPN がサーバーを変更すると数秒後に自動更新されます — すぐに更新するには「再同期」を使用してください。
vpnSync_tooltip.description: Tooltip explaining that VPN sync auto-updates when the VPN changes servers, with a manual Re-sync option.

vpnSync_syncNow.description: Button that performs an initial VPN sync.

vpnSync_resync.description: Button that performs a follow-up VPN sync.

vpnSync_detectedIp.description: Shown after a successful VPN sync. $IP$ is the detected public IP address.

vpnSync_networkError.message: ネットワークエラーが発生しました。もう一度お試しください。
vpnSync_networkError.description: Error toast shown when the VPN sync network call fails.

inputTab_searchCity.description: Tab label for the city-search input mode.

inputTab_enterCoords.description: Tab label for the manual-coordinates input mode.

search_placeholder.description: Placeholder text in the city search input.

search_searching.description: Status shown while a city search is in flight.

search_noResults.message: 場所が見つかりません
search_noResults.description: Status shown when a city search returns no matches.

search_failed.message: 検索に失敗しました。もう一度お試しください。
search_failed.description: Error toast shown when a city search request fails.

search_settingLocation.description: Status shown while a chosen location is being applied.

search_setLocationFailed.message: 位置の設定に失敗しました。もう一度お試しください。
search_setLocationFailed.description: Error toast shown when applying a chosen location fails.

coords_latPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text in the latitude input.

coords_lonPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text in the longitude input.

coords_setButton.description: Button that applies the manually entered coordinates.

coords_invalidLat.message: 無効な緯度です。-90 から 90 の間である必要があります。
coords_invalidLat.description: Validation error shown when latitude is out of range.

coords_invalidLon.message: 無効な経度です。-180 から 180 の間である必要があります。
coords_invalidLon.description: Validation error shown when longitude is out of range.

warning_noLocationSet.message: ⚠️ 保護は有効ですが位置が設定されていません
warning_noLocationSet.description: Warning shown when protection is on but no location is configured.

warning_refreshPage.message: ⚠️ 保護を適用するにはこのページを再読み込みしてください
warning_refreshPage.description: Warning shown when the active page must be reloaded for protection to apply.

notice_restrictedPage.message: ℹ️ このページでは拡張機能を実行できません
notice_restrictedPage.description: Notice shown on browser-internal pages where extensions cannot run.

testLinks_verify.description: Footer link to the hosted verification page that checks the user's protection.

support_needHelp.description: Footer link prompting the user to open the support page.

support_review.message: GeoSpoof を気に入りましたか？
support_review.description: Footer link that opens a short modal asking the user to leave a store review.

review_modal_title.message: GeoSpoof を気に入りましたか？ ❤️
review_modal_title.description: Heading of the modal that asks the user to leave a review.

review_modal_body1.message: GeoSpoof はずっと無料です。追跡なし、アカウント不要。個人の時間で開発・運営しています。
review_modal_body1.description: First paragraph of the review-request modal (desktop builds, which are free forever).

review_modal_body1_ios.message: GeoSpoof は愛情を込めて作っています。追跡なし、アカウント不要。あなたの位置情報を守るため、個人の時間で開発しています。
review_modal_body1_ios.description: First paragraph of the review-request modal on iOS, where the app is freemium so it does not claim to be free.

review_modal_body2.message: レビューを書いていただくことが一番の応援になります。1分ほどで、より多くの人に GeoSpoof を見つけてもらえます。本当にありがとうございます！
review_modal_body2.description: Second paragraph of the review-request modal.

review_modal_cta.description: Primary button in the review modal that opens the store review page.

review_modal_dismiss.description: Secondary button that dismisses the review modal.

webrtc_configFailed.message: WebRTC 保護の設定に失敗しました。拡張機能の権限を確認してください。
webrtc_configFailed.description: Error toast shown when WebRTC protection cannot be configured.

details_spoofedLocation.description: Section title for the spoofed-location details.

details_spoofedTimezone.message: 偽装されたタイムゾーン
details_spoofedTimezone.description: Section title for the spoofed-timezone details.

details_webrtcProtection.description: Section title for the WebRTC protection details.

details_overriddenApis.message: オーバーライドされた API
details_overriddenApis.description: Section title for the list of overridden browser APIs.

details_notConfigured.description: Placeholder shown when a detail field has no value.

details_none.description: Shown when a detail field has no items.

details_noneDisabled.description: Shown when a detail field is empty because protection is off.

details_latitudeLabel.description: Label for the latitude row in the location details.

details_longitudeLabel.description: Label for the longitude row in the location details.

details_accuracyLabel.description: Label for the accuracy row in the location details.

details_locationLabel.description: Label for the location-name row in the location details.

details_identifierLabel.description: Label for the timezone-identifier row in the timezone details.

details_offsetLabel.description: Label for the UTC-offset row in the timezone details.

details_dstOffsetLabel.description: Label for the DST-offset row in the timezone details.

details_dstOffsetMinutes.description: Formatted DST offset in minutes. $MINUTES$ is the integer minute count.

details_fallbackNote.description: Inline note shown when timezone data is estimated rather than authoritative.

details_webrtcActiveStatus.description: Status label shown in the WebRTC details when protection is active.

details_webrtcInactiveStatus.description: Status label shown in the WebRTC details when protection is inactive.

details_webrtcInactiveNote.message: VPN を使用していても WebRTC が真の IP アドレスを漏洩する可能性があります。
details_webrtcInactiveNote.description: Caption shown under the WebRTC status when protection is inactive.

details_section_geolocation.description: Header for the geolocation overrides section.

details_section_timezone.description: Header for the timezone overrides section.

details_section_webrtc.description: Header for the WebRTC overrides section.

details_section_dateTime.description: Header for the date/time overrides section.

details_section_temporal.description: Header for the Temporal API overrides section.

details_section_xslt.description: Header for the XSLT/EXSLT overrides section.

details_section_workers.description: Header for the worker timezone-propagation overrides section.

details_section_antiFingerprinting.message: アンチフィンガープリントと構造
details_section_antiFingerprinting.description: Header for the anti-fingerprinting and structural overrides section.

details_keyOverrides.message: 主なオーバーライド（利用可能な場合）
details_keyOverrides.description: Title of the summary line above the grouped list of overridden APIs.

advanced_button.description: Button that opens the advanced-settings drawer.

advanced_earlyTz.message: 即時タイムゾーン保護
advanced_earlyTz.description: Label for the Firefox-only toggle that grants the userScripts permission to spoof synchronous timezone surfaces from the very first script on a page.

earlyTz_infoAriaLabel.message: 即時タイムゾーン保護の詳細
earlyTz_infoAriaLabel.description: Accessible label on the Instant timezone protection info icon.

earlyTz_tooltip.message: Firefox のみ。オンにするとオプションの「userScripts」権限を要求し、GeoSpoof が各ページ読み込みの最初に実行できるようになります。これにより、保護が有効になる前にサイトが実際のタイムゾーンを読み取れるわずかな隙間を塞ぎます。権限を取り消すにはオフにしてください。
earlyTz_tooltip.description: Tooltip explaining the Firefox-only Instant timezone protection toggle and the userScripts permission it requests.

advanced_debuggerMode.message: エンジンレベルのなりすまし
advanced_debuggerMode.description: Label for the Chrome-only toggle that spoofs the timezone deeper in the browser (via the chrome.debugger API / Chrome DevTools Protocol) so it also covers background workers and applies before a page loads.

debuggerMode_infoAriaLabel.message: エンジンレベルのなりすましについて詳しく
debuggerMode_infoAriaLabel.description: Accessible label on the Engine-level Spoofing info icon.

debuggerMode_tooltip.message: Chrome のみ。ブラウザのより深い層でタイムゾーンを偽装するため、バックグラウンドワーカーにも適用され、ページの読み込み前に有効になります。オンの間は Chrome に「GeoSpoof がこのブラウザのデバッグを開始しました」というバーが表示されますが、これは正常です。標準の保護を使う場合はオフのままにしてください。
debuggerMode_tooltip.description: Tooltip explaining the Chrome-only Engine-level Spoofing toggle and the debugging notification bar it causes.

debuggerBannerHelp_text.message: これがオンの間は Chrome に「GeoSpoof がこのブラウザのデバッグを開始しました」というバーが表示されます。非表示にするには、次のフラグを付けて Chrome を起動してください:
debuggerBannerHelp_text.description: Intro text of the dismissible note shown when Engine-level Spoofing is enabled, explaining how to hide Chrome's debugging notification bar.

debuggerBannerHelp_link.message: バーを非表示にする方法 →
debuggerBannerHelp_link.description: Link to the GeoSpoof help page explaining how to hide Chrome's debugging notification bar.

debuggerBannerHelp_closeAria.description: Accessible label for the button that dismisses the debugging-bar help note.

advanced_verbosity_debug.description: Verbosity level: info and debug logs.

advanced_verbosity_trace.description: Verbosity level: full trace including per-call logs.

advanced_theme.description: Label for the popup theme selector.

advanced_theme_system.description: Theme option that follows the OS appearance.

advanced_theme_light.description: Theme option that forces the light popup theme.

advanced_theme_dark.description: Theme option that forces the dark popup theme.

advanced_accuracy.description: Label for the accuracy selector that controls how the spoofed GeolocationCoordinates.accuracy value is produced.

advanced_accuracy_realistic.description: Accuracy option that picks a device-appropriate value automatically (auto mode).

advanced_accuracy_custom.description: Accuracy option that reveals a numeric input for an exact meter value (fixed mode).

advanced_accuracy_customMeters.description: Label for the numeric input shown when the Custom accuracy option is selected.

advanced_accuracy_customHint.message: 1〜10000メートルの値を入力してください
advanced_accuracy_customHint.description: Inline hint shown when the custom accuracy value is out of the allowed range.

advanced_accuracy_customSet.description: Button that commits the typed custom accuracy value (fixed mode). The custom value is applied only when this button is clicked or Enter is pressed.

advanced_accuracy_customEdit.description: Button that reopens the custom accuracy editor from the compact display showing the committed value.

advanced_coffee.description: Footer link inviting the user to buy the maintainer a coffee.
